Description: Adding more than 10 items of the same product causes a 500 Internal Server Error instead of validation message.
Sorting by 'Price: Low to High' occasionally displays out-of-stock items at the top even if the filter is set to hide them.
'Forgot Password' link overlaps with the 'Login' button on mobile screen resolutions (320px width).
Discount code 'WELCOME10' is applying a 100% discount instead of 10% on the final total.
Search input field allows execution of basic HTML tags (possible XSS vulnerability).
